target: desktop 1440px only; mobile QA intentionally skipped
implemented: BattleResult.divisionCommanderWoundedOfficerIds stores division-command wound officer ids separately from brigade-command wound ids.

createBattleResult derives division-command wounds from outcome, casualty pressure, risk, and low-state subordinate brigade count, and appends 指揮所負傷 to the division commander event when thresholds are crossed.
AfterActionScreen counts brigade and division wounds as a unique officer set, avoiding double-counting officers who hold both brigade and division roles.
applyBattleResult treats division-command wounds as real officer wounds, setting status/recovery and writing 指揮所負傷 into the division-command officer history line.

afterActionDivisionLines: 第1師団師団長 フォス: 6旅団統制、戦線固守・火力支援・工兵支援、師団指揮経験+6、危険度12
第2師団師団長 ヴェーバー: 1旅団統制、予備保持、師団指揮経験+3、危険度12
officerHistoryLines: 東方辺境防衛線防衛戦: 第1師団師団指揮、経験+6、危険度12
東方辺境防衛線防衛戦: 第2師団師団指揮、経験+3、危険度12
observed.note: The short withdrawal smoke path stayed below the deterministic division-command wound threshold, so it verified non-regression and no accidental wound firing rather than naturally triggering 指揮所負傷.

knownQaLimit: A natural high-pressure browser run was not forced in this pass; the high-risk wound branch is implemented in source and will trigger when the deterministic risk thresholds are reached.
